skills.title: Modeling
skills.scope: whole UJG document modeling across Core, Graph, Runtime, Experience, Localization, and optional modules

skills.title: Core Modeling
skills.scope: Core module document containers, imports, top-level nodes, and extensions

skills.title: Graph Modeling
skills.scope: Graph module topology, journeys, states, transitions, exits, outgoing navigation, and indexes

skills.title: Design System Modeling
skills.scope: Design System module semantics and its relationship to Graph and Surface

skills.title: Localization Modeling
skills.scope: Localization module semantics for MessageBundle copy metadata and locale-switch metadata

skills.title: Distributed Journey Modeling
skills.scope: Distributed Journey module semantics for cross-authority human-facing journeys, authorities, distributed artifacts, and authority references
